task_completion.description: Read the tandem UAV geometry specification file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window is open displaying the contents of /home/ga/Desktop/tandem_uav_spec.txt.

task_completion.description: Implement the fuselage and vertical tail components in OpenVSP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP 3D view and Geometry Browser show a fuselage body and a vertical tail component added to the model.

task_completion.description: Implement the forward wing with the correct target span.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A wing component is visible in OpenVSP, named descriptively (e.g., 'Forward Wing') in the Geometry Browser. The span parameter in the wing editor should be set to approximately 6.0m.

task_completion.description: Implement the aft wing with the correct target span and longitudinal separation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second wing component is visible in OpenVSP with a span parameter of approximately 8.0m. The 3D view must clearly show this wing placed behind the forward wing along the longitudinal (X) axis with a visible gap (target 2.0m separation).

task_completion.description: Save the completed OpenVSP model to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, terminal confirmation, or the OpenVSP window title bar shows the file saved as 'tandem_wing_uav.vsp3' in the '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenVSP GUI to construct the aircraft model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenVSP application open with the agent interacting with the Geometry Browser and component edit windows, rather than writing an XML/VSP3 file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered the geometry parameters from the specification.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively typing or adjusting values (like Span, X-location) in the OpenVSP parameter dialogs.

integrity.description: The agent built the model from scratch as requested.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal or file manager does not show the agent copying or moving a pre-existing completed .vsp3 file into the target directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target forward wing span is 6.0m (acceptable range: 4.5m - 7.5m). The target aft wing span is 8.0m (acceptable range: 6.5m - 10.0m). The longitudinal (X-axis) separation between the wings must be strictly greater than 1.0m (target is 2.0m). The final model must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/tandem_wing_uav.vsp3'.
